title: Luffy Battles Cracker
description: On pages 7–10, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Sanji, Niji as The Straw Hats enter Big Mom’s strange territory while Sanji faces the Vinsmoke family and the arranged marriage.
scene: Luffy fights one of Big Mom’s Sweet Commanders while the rescue mission grows more dangerous.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...the hell?! That so called 'lady' is just a mental servant who prepares our meals!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Such a gentleman.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Look! Now it's all over the floor.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll have you know this dish is called 'Aligot'. It's made by carefully mixing potatoes with cheese.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Potatoes strengthen our immune systems...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They help maintain and regulate our blood pres- sures...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Sanji! Please allow me to take care of the cleaning!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nevermind the tons of nutritional value it contains.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: None of you have ever so much as glanced in the direction of an ingredient so you haven't the slightest clue... the time and effort put into selecting and preparing this meat conflict!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I can tell... the sweat and toil that went into preparing this dish had to begin before sunrise.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You mustn't Lord Sanji! Royals should never eat food from off the floor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the most repulsive thing ever!! I think I'm going to throw up!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The seasoning you chose for this... PerFEC- Lion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: DRIP DRIP...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've gotten way too comfort- able rubbing elbows with the low-life commoners!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you insist on calling a yourself my brother,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't stand for such demeaning and despicable acts!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stand down, Niji! Now is not the time or place... not before his wedding!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Ahh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: ...you bring shame to our family!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Being affiliated with this brings shame to me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Spoiled Brats That Don't Appreciate a warm meal...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Men who dare raise their hands against a woman...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Royals who treat the lives of their subordinates as nothing more than expendable Paws...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Everything you do... everything you stand for... goes completely against every fiber in my body!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Your opinions are nothing more than the prattle and musings of the pleblans.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I've never understood how that brain of yours worked ever since we were brats.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Understand this... Royals are meant...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: To act like Royals!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The only person acting disgracefully here, is you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Niji's logic is flawless. You need to reign in that twisted think- ing of yours, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Perhaps it is this man...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Who had such a negative impact on your up- bringing?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Remember someone

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island storyline with 35 dialogue beats. Whole Cake Island becomes a hostile fairy-tale battlefield where Sanji’s rescue and Big Mom’s power are both unavoidable.
